reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar por mi recorrido se llega. Excelente atencion de todos y se compra algo agüita caliente gratis muy calentita ojito.. y sigo viaje

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place, I'm arriving along my route. Excellent service from everyone, and you can buy some hot water for free. Very warm, watch out... and I continue my journey.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención del vendedor de playa Maximiliano!!!
Educado, ágil y servicial.
Felicitaciones!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach vendor, Maximiliano!
Polite, quick, and helpful.
Congratulations!

reviews.comment:
Muy lenta la atención! Ponen un solo empleado a la hora de más sol y te cocinas en la fila para cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Very slow service! They only have one employee during the hottest time of day, and you'll have to wait in line to fill up with gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxa04zVTFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estuvimos como 25 minutos para cargar nafta porque el playero se quedó conversando con un conocido que estaba en una camioneta. Éramos 3/4 autos y todos fastidiados por lo mismo. Uno está cansado del viaje y perder tiempo mientras el empleado charla es de terror. Fue el domingo alrededor de las 22 hs

(Translated by Google)
We were stuck waiting for about 25 minutes to fill up because the attendant was chatting with an acquaintance in a pickup truck. There were three or four cars in our group, and we were all annoyed by the same thing. You're tired from the trip, and wasting time while the employee chats is awful. It was Sunday around 10 pm.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURWXzY3NVNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Baños siempre limpios. Buena oferta de comida. Para abligada cambio a buenos aires.

(Translated by Google)
Bathrooms are always clean. Good food options. Must change to Buenos Aires.

reviews.comment:
Edificación deteriorada. Buen combustible y atención de los playeros. La parrilla libre no está habilitada.

(Translated by Google)
The building is in poor condition. The fuel is good and the attendants are helpful. The barbecue grill is not available.
